caption: A person is crafting on a white gridded cutting mat. The workspace contains various pieces of patterned paper in green and yellow floral motifs, a small white rectangular card, and a white ink pad labeled "MEMEN". A clear stamp block is positioned nearby, featuring the text "BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL the Best things!". In the first frame, the materials are laid out. In the second frame, a hand wearing a white smartwatch and a ring enters the scene, adjusting a piece of floral patterned paper. By the third frame, the hand moves to shift a larger piece of patterned paper that has a brown stripe on one side. In the final frame, the person's other hand enters to press the clear stamp block onto a piece of paper. A logo in the bottom left corner reads "Amazing Jill".
